data.title: Federal Reserve's Balance Sheet Expansion Not Quantitative Easing, Says Kashkari
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, Federal Reserve official Neel Kashkari has stated that the current expansion of the Federal Reserve's balance sheet does not constitute a quantitative easing policy.

data.title: Federal Reserve's Kashkari Optimistic About Economic Growth
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, Federal Reserve official Kashkari expressed optimism regarding the economic outlook, anticipating robust growth. He does not see the need for the Federal Reserve to implement quantitative easing measures.

data.title: Federal Reserve Maintains 2% Inflation Target
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, Federal Reserve official Neel Kashkari stated that the 2% inflation rate remains the Federal Reserve's target, and the institution is committed to achieving this level.

data.title: Federal Reserve's Bostic Warns of Potential Price Pressure
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, Federal Reserve official Bostic has indicated that there may be increased upward pressure on prices, which requires careful monitoring.

data.title: Federal Reserve Official Questions Tightening of Monetary Policy
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, Federal Reserve official Neel Kashkari has expressed some doubts regarding the actual extent of monetary policy tightening.

data.title: Federal Reserve Official Comments on Economic Slowdown
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, Federal Reserve official Neel Kashkari stated that the current economic slowdown is not as severe as the market had anticipated.

data.title: Federal Reserve Official Kashkari Comments on Economic Conditions
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, Federal Reserve official Neel Kashkari has expressed concerns over the current economic situation, describing it as perplexing. He noted that the job market is showing signs of weakness.

data.title: BoE policymaker sees trade diversion easing UK inflation
data.description:
Trade diversion caused by U. S. tariffs on China is helping lower UK inflation by increasing cheaper imports.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/boe-sees-trade-diversion-easing-uk-inflation/

data.title: 50,000 SOL Transferred from Fireblocks Custody to Anonymous Address
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, data from Arkham indicates that at 00:44, 50,000 SOL were transferred from Fireblocks Custody to an anonymous address beginning with 3hYrj.

data.title: Cardano Rallies Toward $0.42 as Institutional Access and Derivatives Fuel Move
data.description:
Cardano is trading higher after a sharp 24-hour advance that pushed ADA back toward the $0. 42 level. The token was last seen around $0. 4219, reflecting roughly a 3% daily gain as momentum picked up across spot and derivatives markets
source: https://www.ethnews.com/cardano-rallies-toward-0-42-as-institutional-access-and-derivatives-fuel-move/

data.title: Bitcoin price reclaims $97K, bulls eye $100K milestone
data.description:
Bitcoin climbed above $97k on a risk-on outlook Gains have also come as Bitcoin ETFs notch huge inflows. Risks include geopolitical escalations. Bitcoin is surging once again after a slow start in 2026, with the latest spike sending BTC to highs of $97,360 amid renewed risk-on sentiment across global markets
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/bitcoin-price-reclaims-97k-bulls-eye-100k-milestone/

data.title: Figure Technology launches on‑chain public equity network for blockchain stock issuance
data.description:
Figure is rolling out a new way for companies to sell stock using blockchain rails instead of the old market plumbing. The blockchain-based lender said it is launching a platform that enables firms to issue on-chain equity, while allowing investors to lend shares directly to one another. No clearinghouses. No retail brokers. No long chain […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/figure-on%e2%80%91chain-public-equity-network/

data.title: Figure unveils onchain equity network aimed at remaking stock trading and lending
data.description:
Figure’s OPEN platform is designed to handle issuance, settlement, and stock lending onchain, instead of replicating existing stock trading.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/385595/figure-onchain-equity-network-aimed-remaking-stock-trading-lending?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Starknet responded to Solana's teasing about its low activity level: "Who gave the data to this little brother Solana?"
data.description: Solana previously posted on the X platform that Starknet, with only 8 daily active users and 10 daily transactions, still boasts a $1 billion market capitalization and $15 billion FDV. Starknet responded, "Who told this little brother of Solana these figures?" Starknet CEO Eli Ben-Sasson also responded, "Solana has 8 marketing interns (all bald) who post 10 tweets a day." Solana co-founder Toly responded, "This is an unnecessary brawl between bald CEOs."

data.title: Dash price soars 125% amid privacy coin boom: Is the rally overheating?
data.description:
DASH price surged as capital rotated into privacy coins, with traders shifting away from Zcash after its governance turmoil.
